prompt: Approved flop sequence start node: choose action.
why_v1: On a flop where the line starts by applying pressure, raising starts by taking initiative now instead of giving a free card with a passive call.
feedback_acceptable_v1: Acceptable. Calling avoids a major mistake, but this flop wants a stronger start because raising takes initiative now instead of giving a free card.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This flop line starts by taking initiative, so raising is stronger than giving a free card with a passive call.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Starting with a call gives up the initiative, but this flop is the spot to apply pressure first with a raise.
